descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Coopers Group AG, leader nel settore Life Sciences, è alla ricerca di un Project Engineer (m/w/d) per la sede di Wallis. Il ruolo prevede la gestione di progetti in ambito ingegneristico, con contratto a tempo pieno e in modalità contracting. Se essere interessato, inviaci la tua candidatura. ## Mansioni ## Requisiti - Life Sciences - Engineering - Wallis - Full Time - Project Management ## ## offrendo Cosa di contratto: Contracting ## Contatto

jobs.title: Lead Expeditor (m/f/d)
jobs.description:
The role plays a key part in monitoring supplier performance and maintaining transparency across Capex projects.
						

											

					 
						 Your Tasks: 

 

 

• Maintain and update material/package reporting systems in the Project Procurement Plan (Web PMP)

• Monitor and ensure On-Time Delivery (OTD) performance for assigned packages in line with KPIs

• Track and collect Supplier Monthly Progress Reports (MPRs) and share them with stakeholders on time

• Follow up with suppliers on delayed or missing reports

• Coordinate expediting interventions with third parties when required

• Prepare and share weekly expediting status and intervention plans

• Support order management with processing expediting-related invoices

• Prepare and maintain MIS reports for tracking performance and progress

 
 Your Profile: 

 

• Minimum 3 years of relevant experience in expediting, procurement, or supply chain

• Previous Capex or project environment experience preferred

• Strong organizational and prioritization skills, with the ability to manage multiple packages/projects

• Proactive mindset with strong problem-solving abilities

• Excellent communication and stakeholder coordination skills

• Advanced Microsoft Office skills, especially Excel and PowerPoint 

• Experience in data analysis and reporting

• Fluent in English

• Willingness to work both in office and on construction/project site

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Il ruolo svolge un ruolo chiave nel monitoraggio delle prestazioni dei fornitori e nel mantenimento della trasparenza tra i progetti Capex. ## Mansioni - Mantenere e aggiornare i sistemi di segnalazione dei materiali/pacchetti nel piano di approvvigionamento del progetto (Web PMP) - Monitorare e garantire le prestazioni di consegna puntuale (OTD) per i pacchetti assegnati in linea con i KPI - Monitorare e raccogliere i rapporti mensili sui progressi dei fornitori (MPR) e condividerli con le parti interessate in tempo - Monitorare con i fornitori le segnalazioni ritardate o mancanti - Coordinare gli interventi di accelerazione con terze parti quando richiesto - Preparare e condividere lo stato di accelerazione settimanale e i piani di intervento - Supportare la gestione degli ordini con l'elaborazione delle fatture relative all'accelerazione - Preparare e mantenere rapporti MIS per il monitoraggio delle prestazioni e dei progressi ## Requisiti - Minimo 3 anni di esperienza pertinente in accelerazione, approvvigionamento o catena di approvvigionamento - Esperienza precedente Capex o ambiente di progetto preferita - Forti capacità organizzative e di prioritizzazione, con la capacità di gestire più pacchetti/progetti - Mentalità proattiva con forti capacità di risoluzione dei problemi - Ottime capacità di comunicazione e coordinamento delle parti interessate - Competenze avanzate di Microsoft Office, in particolare Excel e PowerPoint - Esperienza nell'analisi dei dati e nella reportistica - Fluente in inglese - Volontà di lavorare sia in ufficio che in cantiere/progetto
descriptionByLocale.en: The role plays a key part in monitoring supplier performance and maintaining transparency across Capex projects. Your Tasks: • Maintain and update material/package reporting systems in the Project Procurement Plan (Web PMP) • Monitor and ensure On-Time Delivery (OTD) performance for assigned packages in line with KPIs • Track and collect Supplier Monthly Progress Reports (MPRs) and share them with stakeholders on time • Follow up with suppliers on delayed or missing reports • Coordinate expediting interventions with third parties when required • Prepare and share weekly expediting status and intervention plans • Support order management with processing expediting-related invoices • Prepare and maintain MIS reports for tracking performance and progress Your Profile: • Minimum 3 years of relevant experience in expediting, procurement, or supply chain • Previous Capex or project environment experience preferred • Strong organizational and prioritization skills, with the ability to manage multiple packages/projects • Proactive mindset with strong problem-solving abilities • Excellent communication and stakeholder coordination skills • Advanced Microsoft Office skills, especially Excel and PowerPoint • Experience in data analysis and reporting • Fluent in English • Willingness to work both in office and on construction/project site
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Die Rolle spielt eine Schlüsselrolle bei der Überwachung der Lieferantenleistung und der Aufrechterhaltung der Transparenz bei allen Capex-Projekten. ## Mansioni - Pflegen und aktualisieren Sie die Material-/Paketberichterstattungssysteme im Projektbeschaffungsplan (Web PMP) - Überwachen und gewährleisten Sie die Pünktlichkeit der Lieferung (OTD) für zugewiesene Pakete gemäß den KPIs - Verfolgen und sammeln Sie die monatlichen Fortschrittsberichte (MPRs) der Lieferanten und teilen Sie sie rechtzeitig mit den Stakeholdern - Verfolgen Sie verspätete oder fehlende Berichte mit den Lieferanten - Koordinieren Sie bei Bedarf beschleunigte Interventionen mit Dritten - Bereiten Sie wöchentliche Beschleunigungsstatus- und Interventionspläne vor und teilen Sie diese - Unterstützen Sie das Auftragsmanagement bei der Bearbeitung von Rechnungen, die mit der Beschleunigung zusammenhängen - Bereiten und pflegen Sie MIS-Berichte zur Verfolgung von Leistung und Fortschritt ## Requisiti - Mindestens 3 Jahre einschlägige Erfahrung in der Beschleunigung, Beschaffung oder Lieferkette - Frühere Capex- oder Projektumgebungserfahrung bevorzugt - Starke Organisations- und Priorisierungsfähigkeiten mit der Fähigkeit, mehrere Pakete/Projekte zu verwalten - Proaktive Denkweise mit starken Fähigkeiten zur Problemlösung - Ausgezeichnete Kommunikations- und Koordinationsfähigkeiten der Stakeholder - Fortgeschrittene Microsoft Office-Kenntnisse, insbesondere Excel und PowerPoint - Erfahrung in der Datenanalyse und Berichterstattung - Fließend in Englisch - Bereitschaft, sowohl im Büro als auch auf der Baustelle/Projektseite zu arbeiten
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione Ce rôle joue un rôle clé dans le suivi des performances des fournisseurs et le maintien de la transparence dans l'ensemble des projets Capex. ## Mansioni - Maintenir et mettre à jour les systèmes de rapports sur le matériel et le paquet dans le Plan d'approvisionnement du projet (PGR Web) - Surveiller et assurer le rendement de la livraison dans les délais prescrits (DTO) pour les colis attribués conformément aux ICR - Suivre et recueillir les rapports d'étape mensuels des fournisseurs (RPT) et les partager avec les intervenants à temps - Suivre avec les fournisseurs les rapports retardés ou manquants - Coordonner l'accélération des interventions avec des tiers au besoin - Préparer et partager chaque semaine l'état d'avancement et les plans d'intervention - Soutenir la gestion des commandes avec le traitement des factures liées à l'accélération - Préparer et tenir à jour les rapports de SIG pour suivre le rendement et les progrès ## Requisiti - Minimum 3 ans d'expérience pertinente dans l'accélération, l'approvisionnement ou la chaîne d'approvisionnement - Expérience antérieure de Capex ou d'environnement de projet préférée - Fortes compétences en matière d'organisation et de hiérarchisation, avec la capacité de gérer plusieurs paquets/projets - Un état d'esprit proactif avec de résolution de problèmes - Excellentes compétences en communication et en coordination avec les intervenants

requirements: Minimum 3 years of relevant experience in expediting, procurement, or supply chain
Previous Capex or project environment experience preferred
Strong organizational and prioritization skills, with the ability to manage multiple packages/projects
Proactive mindset with strong problem-solving abilities
Excellent communication and stakeholder coordination skills
Advanced Microsoft Office skills, especially Excel and PowerPoint
Experience in data analysis and reporting
Willingness to work both in office and on construction/project site

en: Minimum 3 years of relevant experience in expediting, procurement, or supply chain
Previous Capex or project environment experience preferred
Strong organizational and prioritization skills, with the ability to manage multiple packages/projects
Proactive mindset with strong problem-solving abilities
Excellent communication and stakeholder coordination skills
Advanced Microsoft Office skills, especially Excel and PowerPoint
Experience in data analysis and reporting
